subparts.text: What is a marketing channel in the context of supply chain management? CO 1
Define just-in-time inventory and state its benefit. CO 1
State any two key issues in supply chain management CO 2
Why is achieving strategic fit important in SCM CO 2
What do you mean by Bullwhip Effect in demand forecasting? CO 3
Differentiate between Push-based and Pull-based supply chains. CO 3
What is the difference between Third Party Logistics and Fourth Party Logistics ? CO 4
What is the role of 3PL providers in modern supply chains? CO 4

questions.question_text: Explain the strategic importance of warehousing in the supply chain. Include different types of warehouses and their functions CO 1
Evaluate the role of distribution in supply chain efficiency. How does it impact customer satisfaction and organizational profitability? CO 1
Identify and explain the key issues faced in managing a supply chain, including global challenges CO 2
Analyze the importance of customer-centric supply chain strategies and how they provide competitive advantage. CO 2
What are the key inventory management practices in a modern supply chain environment? Explain with examples. CO 3
How does poor inventory management affect the performance and profitability of a supply chain? Provide examples. CO 3
Analyze the importance of Retailer-Supplier Partnerships . How do they enhance collaboration and reduce inefficiencies? CO 4
Create a framework for evaluating suppliers for a manufacturing firm, considering quality, cost, delivery, and sustainability. CO 4
